summary: A fixed-fee SOW for migrating Phoenix Industries' data pipeline from Airflow to Dagster, delivered by BlueRiver Consulting for USD $42,000 across three milestones.

parties.name: Phoenix Industries Inc.
parties.evidence_quote: Phoenix Industries Inc., a Texas corporation

parties.name: BlueRiver Consulting Group LLC
parties.evidence_quote: BlueRiver Consulting Group LLC, a California limited liability company

key_details.label: Term
key_details.evidence_quote: shall commence on the Effective Date and shall continue through September 30, 2026

key_details.label: Fee
key_details.value: Fixed fee of USD $42,000 across three milestones ($10,000 / $16,000 / $16,000)
key_details.evidence_quote: fixed fee of forty-two thousand U.S. dollars (USD $42,000), payable as follows: $10,000 upon execution of this SOW; $16,000 upon completion of the Dagster cutover; and $16,000 upon completion of the operational handoff

key_details.label: Deliverables
key_details.value: Migration of the Airflow data pipeline to Dagster, with DAG conversions and historical backfill
key_details.evidence_quote: Migration of Client's data pipeline from the legacy Airflow 1.x environment to a managed Dagster deployment, including all DAG conversions and historical-backfill orchestration

key_details.label: IP ownership
key_details.value: Work made for hire — deliverables are the exclusive property of Client
key_details.evidence_quote: shall be considered "work made for hire" and shall be the exclusive property of Client

key_details.label: Termination
key_details.value: 14 days' written notice by either party
key_details.evidence_quote: Either Party may terminate this SOW upon fourteen (14) days' written notice

key_details.label: Governing law
key_details.evidence_quote: laws of the State of California

key_details.label: Kill fee
key_details.value: 25% of unbilled fees if Client terminates for convenience
key_details.evidence_quote: kill fee equal to twenty-five percent (25%) of any unbilled fees remaining under this SOW

key_details.label: Limitation of liability
key_details.value: Capped at total fees paid under the SOW; no indirect or consequential damages
key_details.evidence_quote: aggregate liability arising out of or in connection with this SOW shall not exceed the total fees paid by Client to Provider under this SOW
